overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a dirt path through a dark, moonlit rural landscape. The character travels from open grassland through a dense forest and emerges into a field with livestock, with snow-capped mountains visible in the distance throughout.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path through open grassland, two swords visible on his back

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through the grass
expansive grassy fields stretching to the horizon
expansive grassy fields stretching to the horizon
snow-capped mountain peaks visible against the night sky
large boulders and rock formations scattered in the field
dark silhouette of pine forest on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt path through open grassland at night. Scattered rocks dot the landscape, and a snow-capped mountain range is visible on the left horizon while a distant pine forest looms ahead.

events.description: path enters dense pine forest with trees closing in on both sides, creating an enclosed corridor

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking through the dark forest corridor, flanked by tall pine trees

entered.detail: tall pine trees forming a wall on the left side of the path
tall pine trees forming a wall on the right side of the path
dense shrubs and low vegetation beneath the trees
dense shrubs and low vegetation beneath the trees
large moss-covered boulder among the trees

segments.scene_description: The path enters a dense pine forest, creating a narrow corridor with trees pressing in on both sides. The environment becomes darker and more enclosed as Geralt walks through the woodland, with the mountain still occasionally visible through the canopy.

events.description: exiting dense forest into open farmland with a wooden structure visible ahead
cows become visible grazing near the path on both sides

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks through the field approaching and passing cows grazing near the path

notable_agents.action: cows standing and grazing near the path edge
cows grazing and looking toward the character

entered.detail: open grassy fields returning as the forest ends
open grassy fields returning as the forest ends
small wooden building or barn visible in the distance
brown and white cattle grazing in the field
brown and white cattle grazing in the field
wooden fence posts marking the field boundary

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the forest, the scene opens into farmland with a wooden structure visible ahead. Cows appear grazing near the path as Geralt continues walking, passing through the herd in the moonlit field.

events.description: path curves slightly to the right as the character moves past the livestock area

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking along the winding path through the meadow, leaving the cows behind

notable_agents.action: cows grazing at a distance in the field to the left

entered.detail: yellow wildflowers growing along the path edge

segments.scene_description: The path continues through the open meadow with wildflowers visible on the sides. The cows recede into the middle distance to the left as the wooden farm structures pass out of view, with the mountain range remaining prominent on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a moonlit open grassland gradually narrows into a dense, enclosing pine forest. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path through wide fields dotted with scattered rocks, with a snow-capped mountain range visible on the left horizon. As the path leads forward, the open landscape shifts toward a looming wall of trees that begins to crowd the periphery. The scene then transitions into a dark woodland corridor where the towering pines press in from both sides, limiting the view of the distant mountains to occasional glimpses through the thick canopy.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as the character emerges from a dense forest into an expansive, moonlit farmland. It begins by breaking through the tree line into an open field, where the camera tracks forward toward a wooden farm structure. As the character continues along the dirt path, the scene shifts to pass through a herd of grazing cows under the pale light of the moon. The view then expands across a wide meadow dotted with wildflowers, with the livestock and farm buildings receding into the distance. Finally, the camera maintains its forward momentum through the open landscape, keeping the prominent snow-capped mountain range centered on the horizon.
